description_long: This is a modern, boxy couch with a quilted dark blue exterior and a high, continuous backrest and armrest on one side. The seat area is covered with a red and black checkered blanket, and a matching pillow is placed at one end, suggesting a daybed or sleeper function. The upholstery features a diamond-quilted pattern, giving the couch a plush, padded appearance. The base and sides are solid and fully enclosed, with no visible legs or underframe. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with sharp, clean lines and a sturdy, monolithic form. The couch appears comfortable and is likely intended for both sitting and reclining, suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces.
description: A boxy, quilted dark blue couch with a high back and side, topped with a red checkered blanket and pillow. The design is minimalist, fully enclosed, and plush, with a modern geometric look.
description_view_0: Front and angled view showing the quilted blue exterior, high back and side, and the red checkered blanket and pillow on the seat.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the full width of the couch, the high backrest, and the arrangement of the blanket and pillow.
description_view_2: Side and rear view displaying the solid, quilted blue panels and the absence of visible legs or underframe.
description_view_3: Top-down and rear view emphasizing the continuous, diamond-quilted back and side panels, with minimal visibility of the seat area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, integrated seat cushion covered by a checkered blanket, with a single matching pillow at one end; all cushions appear attached and not loose.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Diamond-quilted pattern on the exterior blue fabric, with a red and black checkered blanket and matching pillow on the seat.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed with the same quilted fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_armrest_design: Single, high, straight armrest on one side, fully integrated and covered in quilted fabric, matching the backrest in height and style.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and fully attached backrest, covered in diamond-quilted fabric, forming a solid, monolithic structure.
